title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños, through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Neil Andrew N. Nocon to accept the donation from Igloo Supply Chain Philippines Inc., with office address at Manggahan Light Industrial Park, 1611 Eulogio "Amang" Rodriguez Avenue, Pasig City, consisting of Forty-Eight (48) pieces of 3 x 1.2 meter long-span roofing materials for the rehabilitation of the Municipal Material Recovery Facility.
